variants.title: Filtrec A142C25 Spin-On Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec A142C25. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the A142C25 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 25µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 96.0 mm, Length: 210.0 mm, Thread: 1 1/2"-16 UN, Δ Collapse Pressure: 17 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 25µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Collapse Pressure: 17 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: Mann Filter WK 930/6 x Fuel Filter | Replaces the Filtrec A142C25
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter WK 930/6 x Fuel Filter | Replaces the Filtrec A142C25
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER fuel filters remove unwanted and damaging dirt particles from the fuel and thus prevent possible damage. Thanks to the highest degree of separation and sealing, the fuel filter ensures functional reliability and optimum protection during the entire maintenance interval.
specifications: Style: Fuel Filter, Dimension A: 93.0 mm, Dimension B: 62.0 mm, Dimension C: 72.0 mm, Dimension G: 7/8-14 UNF-2B, Dimension H: 175.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 25µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 96.0 mm, Length: 210.0 mm, Media Type: Cellulose, Thread: 1 1/2"-16 UN, Collapse Pressure: 17 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C
